What we do

Our Services

Court Construction

Turnkey padel arenas built for desert heat — Spanish glass, galvanized frames, 145km/h wind rating.

Build yours →

Racket Shop

Elite rackets, balls and gear — curated drops from Stealth, HEAD, Wilson and more, priced in AED.

Shop now →

Pre-Owned Rackets

Inspected and re-gripped pro rackets at accessible prices — trade in your old racket for credit.

Browse pre-owned →

Maintenance & Upgrades

Turf renewal, lighting, smart cameras and acoustic dampening retrofits for existing courts.

Talk to us →

Who we are

Crafted for
the Obsessed

Born in Al Quoz, Dubai — we fuse Spanish structural glass with aerospace-grade metal alloys to build courts that ignore high winds, and curate rackets that protect your game. Architectural integrity meets player stamina.
